description_long: This object consists of a stack of five plastic beach chairs, each with a slatted backrest and seat, and armrests on both sides. The chairs are molded from colored plastic, with visible ventilation slats running vertically along the backrest and horizontally across the seat. The stack includes chairs in white, green, blue, and red, with each chair fitting snugly into the one below it for compact storage. The design is lightweight and utilitarian, typical for outdoor or urban park seating, and the plastic construction makes it weather-resistant and easy to clean. The armrests are integrated into the frame, and the legs are slightly flared for stability. The overall appearance is functional, colorful, and suitable for casual public or private outdoor environments.
description: A stack of five colorful plastic beach chairs with slatted backs, armrests, and a lightweight, weather-resistant design. The chairs are nested together for compact storage and feature a utilitarian, urban-friendly style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stack of five chairs, highlighting the slatted seat and backrest design, as well as the armrests and the way the chairs nest together.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the slatted backrests, the armrests on both sides, and the color sequence of the stacked chairs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the profile of the armrests, the slatted seat, and the compact stacking of the chairs.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the vertical slats on the backrests and the alignment of the stacked chairs, with the red chair slightly separated from the stack.
